questions.statement:

<p><strong>Directions: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.</strong></p>

<p>On the horizon</p>
options: An event that is likely to happen soon /
A plan for the distant future /
The successful beginning of a business venture /
An event that is likely to end soon /

questions.statement:
<p><strong>Directions: Choose the alternative which is closest to the opposite in the meaning of the underlined word in the sentence.</strong></p>

<p>Harold was an excellent husband-tender, thoughtful, proud, and affectionate; he was <u>irreproachable</u>.</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate SYNONYM of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>Perilous&nbsp;</p>

<p>able to move quickly and easily&nbsp;</p>

<p style="">A Hair&rsquo;s Breadth</p>
options: Someone who is not very social with other people /
A very small distance or amount /

questions.statement:
